generated_oml:

    base:desc "Sensor component in Building Control System (BCS)"

]

    base:desc "Actuator component in Building Control System (BCS)"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller component in Building Control System (BCS)"
]

    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from BCS components"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

    base:desc "Semantic data for BCS components"

]

instance GeometricBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric BIM models enriched with semantic data for Building Control System (BCS) components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalOptimizationService
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPointsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalOptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualization
]

]

instance OperationalOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalInsight
]

    base:desc "Immersive interactive visualization interfaces for Facility Managers to monitor system states and operate physical infrastructure"
]

instance MaintenanceForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance and performance forecasting"
]

instance OperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational insights from custom analytics services integrated via standardized extension points"
]

instance CentralizedDTFramework : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework architecture coordinating multiple digital twin instances"
    base:contains BuildingControlEngineerRole, FacilityManagerRole, DTEngineerRole
]

instance BuildingControlEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [

]

instance FacilityManagerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [

]

instance DTEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "DT Engineers extend capabilities through service integration"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization provides immersive interfaces for monitoring and control, enabling Facility Managers to interact with the deployed Digital Twin for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts, with runtime configuration management enabling adjustments without requiring full redeployment."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The modular architecture features standardized extension points for component integration, with the DT Framework acting as a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange and holistic building lifecycle management, supported by runtime configuration management for adaptive adjustments."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM for sensors, actuators, and controllers; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) based transformation to structured representations; automated generation of deployable DT artifacts; real-time data synchronization between physical and digital twins; interactive visualization for monitoring and control; and modular evolution through standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT Framework acts as a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange through a modular architecture with standardized extension points for service integration."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Model-driven deployment leveraging Unreal Engine for interactive visualization, standardized extension points for modular service integration, and runtime configuration management enabling dynamic adjustments without full redeployment."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems is addressed through non-functional requirements, with the DT Framework facilitating bidirectional data exchange and integration with BIM tools for device modeling, supporting scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework utilizes Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards for initial device modeling and incorporates standardized extension points to ensure interoperability and integration of custom services, addressing the industry's lack of standardized digital twin integration frameworks."
]
